results.title: Report: Ireland will need over 2,000 health staff, mostly for elderly
results.description: DUBLIN, Ireland: A new report says Ireland will need over 2,000 more public health and community nurses by 2040. The Economic and Social Research Institute (ESRI) predicts a significant rise in demand for staff in primary and community healthcare by the end of the next decade, compared with 2022. The research, funded by the HSE, shows the biggest increase in staff will be in services for older people livi
